blended.narrative: Horseshoe Resort is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.8 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 973 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.3" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 2.7" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
